blockers.description: No real local Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct path is confirmed.
blockers.required_resolution: Provide a real local model/tokenizer path or explicitly authorize an external resource for the successor execution task.

blockers.description: The expected Stanford Alpaca first-slice labeled pairs JSONL is missing.
blockers.required_resolution: Restore or regenerate data/stanford_alpaca/first_slice/alpaca_first_slice_labeled_pairs.jsonl from the frozen first-slice label materialization chain.

blockers.description: The expected prior target-response-generation plan directory is missing.
blockers.required_resolution: Restore or regenerate outputs/dualscope_first_slice_target_response_generation_plan/default before Qwen2.5-7B response generation.

non_blocking_observations.description: Two RTX 3090 GPUs are visible, but no model inference readiness is certified.
A Qwen2.5-1.5B local path exists, but it is pilot/debug only and is not a substitute for 7B main-model evidence.
